name: New York Cupboard Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken broth and water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Add the orzo and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until tender.
3. Stir in the corn, black beans, white chicken meat, mushrooms, roasted red peppers, and dried parsley.
4. Reduce heat to maintain a gentle simmer and continue cooking until all vegetables are heated through and flavors meld (about 5 more minutes).
5. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
6. Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Makes about 4 to 6 servings.
